en-US.name: Beetle Larvae: Rearing Tracker
en-US.subtitle: Stag & Rhino Grub Instar Log
en-US.promotional_text: Rearing stag or rhino beetle larvae? Log each grub's instar, weight, and temperature to know when to change substrate and when a pupal cell forms.
en-US.description:
Rearing beetle larvae and not sure what to do next? Beetle Larvae turns each grub's instar days, weight trajectory, and chamber temperature into clear per-larva guidance - when to change substrate, when a pupal cell may be forming, and when it's safe to dig.

Larvae live buried and invisible for months. A grub that stops moving reads as dead, so a beginner digs it up and destroys a forming pupal cell. Weight that climbs then drops reads as starving, but it's the prepupa signal. Warmth speeds growth but yields smaller, shorter-lived adults instead of a major male. The scale alone can't tell you any of this.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Add each larva: species, instar entry date, substrate type.
2. Log weight and chamber temperature as you go.
3. You get a per-larva verdict with the reason - change substrate, prepupa imminent, do not disturb, or safe to dig.

Under a minute to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Per-Larva Verdict
One clear answer for each grub plus the why - current instar, estimated stage progress from accumulated degree-days, and the next action to take.

Instar & Stage Log
Track L1, L2, L3, pupa, and adult with entry dates, so you always know where each larva stands.

Species Reference
Typical stage lengths, temperature ranges, and substrate notes for stag, rhino, and flower beetles, with plain-language guidance instead of scattered care sheets.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Track unlimited larvae grouped by chamber
- Weight-trajectory chart with prepupa early-warning
- Degree-day growth estimate and eclosion-date projection
- Substrate-due and pupal-cell-lock notifications
- Temperature-vs-size guide for growing major males
- Per-larva notes and photos

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Beetle Larvae is an informational rearing tool. Estimates use general husbandry references and community-reported figures and vary by species, individual, substrate, and temperature. It is not a substitute for a breeder's own judgment or the guidance of experienced keepers.
